title_cn: 黑石首席运营官 |增长和人工智能驱动的经济顺风
summary: Jon Gray, Blackstone President & COO, addressed investor concerns about market volatility and liquidity pressures. He emphasized that while noise and uncertainty may prompt investors to seek liquidity, the resilience of certain financial products, particularly Business Development Companies (BDCs), is a key factor to watch.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla Sales Helped by High Gas Prices
title_cn: 高油价推动特斯拉销量增长
summary: Tesla says rising gas prices have boosted interest in its electric vehicles. The surprisingly optimistic comments came weeks after the automaker reported lower-than-expected car sales to start the year and as it pivots its focus to AI and robotics. Jessica Caldwell, head of insights at Edmunds, joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Tapped for Group Developing Golden Dome Software
title_cn: SpaceX 被任命为金顶软件开发团队
summary: SpaceX is part of a group of companies developing the operating system underpinning President Donald Trump’s Golden Dome initiative, according to sources. It is an expansion of the role Elon Musk's company is playing in the US missile defense shield. Bloomberg’s Michael Shepard joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ‘Looksmaxxing’ Influencer Clavicular Kicked Off YouTube Again
title_cn: “Looksmaxxing”影响者锁骨再次从 YouTube 上消失
summary: Controversial social-media figure Clavicular, known for his extreme approach to achieving male beauty standards, had his videos removed again from YouTube on Wednesday night.

title: Meta, Microsoft Plan Cuts, Buyouts That May Affect 23,000 Jobs
title_cn: Meta、微软计划裁员、收购可能影响 23,000 个工作岗位
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. and Microsoft Corp. are planning cuts or announcing buyouts that could affect as many as 23,000 jobs, part of an effort to streamline operations and offset heavy spending on artificial intelligence.

title: CBRE Group CEO Sees AI as Tailwind, Bullish on NYC Growth
title_cn: 世邦魏理仕集团首席执行官将人工智能视为顺风车，看好纽约市的增长
summary: CBRE Group CEO Robert Sulentic says he is bullish on long-term growth across New York City. Speaking with Norah Mulinda on Bloomberg Television, Sulentic also says CBRE will become "net winners" thanks to AI.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel’s $250 Billion Rally Slams Into a Potential Earnings Wall
title_cn: 英特尔 2500 亿美元的涨势撞上了潜在的盈利墙
summary: Intel Corp. has been one of the hottest stocks in the market over the past 12 months, soaring 230% to the highest price since the dot-com bubble. But the rally is facing a potential roadblock in the company’s first-quarter earnings report due after the close Thursday.

title: Trump Vows to Review Federal Workers’ Prediction Market Bets
title_cn: 特朗普发誓要审查联邦工人的预测市场赌注
summary: President Donald Trump said he would investigate federal employees placing bets on event-betting platforms, indicating concerns with prediction markets amid worries that individuals are using confidential government information to profit.

title: Trump Says the US Is Weighing Purchase of Spirit Airlines
title_cn: 特朗普称美国正在考虑购买精神航空
summary: President Donald Trump said he is considering having the US purchase Spirit Aviation Holdings Inc., saying it could be a potentially good investment for the federal government.

title: US Reduces Marijuana Restrictions in Lift to Ailing Industry
title_cn: 美国减少大麻限制，为陷入困境的行业提供帮助
summary: The US Justice Department reclassified state-regulated marijuana as a less dangerous drug, a major shift that could increase legal cannabis sales and help a struggling industry.

title: US Soldier Charged With Using Classified Data to Bet on Maduro
title_cn: 美国士兵被控利用机密数据押注马杜罗
summary: A US Army soldier was charged with using classified information about the timing of the US military’s capture of then-Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro to make more than $400,000 trading on Polymarket’s prediction market, the Justice Department said Thursday.

title: US Needs 'Patience' in Iran: John Bolton
title_cn: 约翰·博尔顿：美国在伊朗问题上需要“耐心”
summary: John Bolton, former US National Security Advisor and former US Ambassador to the United Nations, argues the US should take the time necessary to overthrow the regime in Iran. He says the damage to Iran's military and nuclear infrastructure is significant, but urges continued pressure to induce regime collapse, adding the President's original 4-6 week timeline "was never realistic." He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says He's Considering Having the US Buy Spirit Airlines
title_cn: 特朗普表示他正在考虑让美国购买精神航空
summary: President Donald Trump says the administration is considering a financial rescue package or possibly buying Spirit Airlines during remarks to reporters in the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Krishnamoorthi: Iran War a 'Colossal Disaster'
title_cn: 众议员克里希纳莫提：伊朗战争是一场“巨大灾难”
summary: Representative Raja Krishnamoorthi (D-IL), a member of the House Oversight and Intelligence Committees, calls the conflict with Iran a "colossal disaster," warning Tehran now has a "chokehold" on global energy via the Strait of Hormuz. He argues the war is driving up costs for Americans - from gasoline to groceries - while hurting farmers and depleting US munitions stockpiles, and says the conflict should be ended immediately through diplomacy. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Putin G-20 Visit Would ‘Probably Be Very Helpful’
title_cn: 特朗普称普京二十国集团访问“可能非常有帮助”
summary: US President Donald Trump said he didn’t expect Vladimir Putin to attend the Group of 20 meeting at his resort in Doral, Florida, later this year, but said the Russian leader’s participation could be useful.

title: Trump Says Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Extended Three Weeks
title_cn: 特朗普称以色列与黎巴嫩停火期限延长三周
summary: President Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon will extend their ceasefire by three weeks to work on a long-term deal during remarks to reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil Seeks New Measures to Tame War Impact on Fuels
title_cn: 巴西寻求新措施来减轻战争对燃料的影响
summary: Brazil’s government will ask Congress for authorization to use extraordinary revenue linked to oil to cut taxes on fuel such as gasoline, diesel, ethanol and biodiesel.

title: Sen. Hagerty on Iran, Budget Talks
title_cn: 参议员哈格蒂谈伊朗和预算谈判
summary: Senator Bill Hagerty (R-TN), a member of the Senate Foreign Relations and Banking Committees, says President Trump "has all the cards" in Iran negotiations and warns Tehran's oil storage constraints could become a near-term breaking point. Hagerty also backs Kevin Warsh as Fed chair amid confirmation uncertainty, urging Democrats to advance his nomination, and expresses optimism on budget negotiations while warning DHS funding lapses could heighten security risks. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israel and Lebanon Will Extend Their Ceasefire, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称以色列和黎巴嫩将延长停火期限
summary: President Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon will extend their ceasefire by three weeks, a move that creates space to work on a long-term deal and removes a roadblock to ending the US war with Iran.

title: Carney Says Booze Bans Can Be Resolved ‘Quickly’ if US Acts
title_cn: 卡尼表示，如果美国采取行动，禁酒令可以“迅速”解决
summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney says provincial liquor store bans on US alcohol can be resolved “quickly” if the Trump administration takes steps of its own to settle trade disputes.

title: Japan, Australia to Tighten Ties With Economic Deal, Kyodo Says
title_cn: 日本共同社称，日本和澳大利亚将通过经济协议加强联系
summary: Japan and Australia are set to add to their close and burgeoning defense relationship, with the two nations set to seal an economic security deal in early May, Kyodo News reported.

title: EU Opens Door to Talks With Ukraine on Next Membership Steps
title_cn: 欧盟为与乌克兰就下一步入盟步骤进行谈判敞开大门
summary: European Union leaders signaled that preliminary conditions are in place for Ukraine to begin the first stage of the membership process, a boost for Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy’s efforts to join the bloc.

title: US-Iran Tensions Build Over Hormuz as Peace Talks Stall
title_cn: 和平谈判陷入僵局，美伊关系因霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势加剧
summary: US and Iran tensions grew over the Strait of Hormuz with both sides maintaining their blockades of the critical waterway, creating an uneasy standoff with no sign of peace talks on the horizon.

title: Trump Says US Wouldn’t Use Nuclear Weapon Against Iran: Q&A
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国不会对伊朗使用核武器：问答
summary: President Trump told reporters he would not use a nuclear weapon against Iran and once again said that he doesn't see conflict with Iran lasting much longer as he took questions at an Oval Office event on drug pricing. Trump told reporters that rising gas prices are not as high as he expected, but warned that Americans will be paying more for gas for a 'little while.' The president also commented on the ousting of Navy Secretary James Phelan, saying that conflicts emerged about shipbuilding. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Iran Pivots Spotlight Washington’s Insider Trade Threat
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗战略重心凸显华盛顿的内幕贸易威胁
summary: In the oil market, volatility recently spiked to levels not seen since the onset of the Covid-19 pandemic. Commodities and stocks globally have whipsawed in response to every twist and turn in the Iran war: A strike, a pause, a threat to wipe out a civilization, a ceasefire; then a deal, no deal, and the prospect of one again.

title: Trump Says Higher Gas Prices Will Remain 'For a Little While'
title_cn: 特朗普称汽油价格上涨将持续“一段时间”
summary: President Donald Trump says the US is in total control of the Strait of Hormuz during a health-care affordability event at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Messaging Blitz Divides Advisers as Iran Talks Waver
title_cn: 伊朗谈判动摇之际，特朗普的信息闪电战让顾问们产生了分歧
summary: The prospect of Iran agreeing to more in-person peace talks with the US is being hindered by President Donald Trump’s threats and brash social media posts, according to several officials with knowledge of the diplomatic efforts to end their war.

title: Two Primaries to Test Trump’s Grip on Republican Politics
title_cn: 两场初选考验特朗普对共和党政治的掌控力
summary: The president is backing opponents of two Republican incumbents in primaries.

title: Meta, Microsoft to Trim Workforces Amid AI Spending | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 4/23/2026
title_cn: Meta 和微软将在人工智能支出中裁员彭博商业周刊日报 2026 年 4 月 23 日
summary: On today's episode of Bloomberg Businessweek Daily, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec speak with Bloomberg Tech Co-Host Ed Ludlow about Meta and Microsoft looking to trim their workforces amid heavy AI spending. Then, Lombard Odier Investment Head of Macro Florian Ielpo weighs in on markets as oil climbs amid a continued Iran ceasfire, and stocks waver near record highs. Then, Curaleaf CEO Boris Jordan weighs in on cannabis markets amid new US legislation. Plus, ob Sulentic, CBRE Group Chairman & CEO, joins Bloomberg TV Markets Correspondent Norah Mulinda for a conversation about earnings, data center real estate, and the current real estate backdrop in New York City. Finally, Dr. Doug Lucas, LifeMD Bone Health & Longevity Clinical Lead, speaks about women’s bone health. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GOP’s DHS Funding Plan Exposes Party Split on Affordability Push
title_cn: 共和党的国土安全部资助计划暴露了党派在推动负担能力方面的分歧
summary: Senate Republicans are on a collision course with many of their House counterparts over whether to use their most powerful legislative tool — a spending bill Democrats can’t stop — to narrowly fund the Homeland Security department or to go big and try one last election-year push on affordability.

title: EU Warns Trade Deal With US at Risk Over Effort to Strengthen It
title_cn: 欧盟警告与美国的贸易协议因强化协议而面临风险
summary: The European Union warned member states that efforts to strengthen safeguards in the bloc’s trade agreement with the US may cause the deal to unravel.

title: Trump Attack Order Highlights Danger of Iran’s ‘Mosquito Fleet’
title_cn: 特朗普的攻击命令凸显了伊朗“蚊子舰队”的危险
summary: President Donald Trump’s order for the US to attack Iranian gunboats is the latest sign that an asymmetrical war-fighting strategy is stymieing the world’s mightiest navy, with US aircraft and destroyers forced to track swarming speedboats in a vital energy waterway.

title: Billionaires’ Row Towers Are Flashpoint for NYC Tax on Rich
title_cn: 亿万富翁的排塔是纽约市对富人征税的导火索
summary: When Mayor Zohran Mamdani declared a new tax was coming for wealthy property owners in New York City, he wanted to make clear it was “designed for the richest of the rich.”

title: Carney, Alberta Near Deal on Carbon Price on Energy and Industry
title_cn: 艾伯塔省卡尼即将就能源和工业碳价格达成协议
summary: The Canadian government is closing in on a deal with Alberta for a carbon price on energy producers and other industries, but they’re still haggling over how quickly it will be implemented.

title: US-Iran Tensions Build in Hormuz Without Talks | Balance of Power: Early Edition 4/23/2026
title_cn: 美国与伊朗在没有谈判的情况下在霍尔木兹地区紧张局势加剧权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 4 月 23 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Trump's order to strike boats laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz as the tennuous ceasefire between the US and Iran continues without peace talks and news that Meta plans to cut 10% of its workforce. On today's show, former Deputy Commander of U.S. Central Command Vice Admiral Robert Harward (ret.), Republican Main Street Partnership President and CEO Sarah Chamberlain, former White House Deputy Chief of Staff under President Barack Obama Jim Messina, Bloomberg Economics Chief Geoeconomics Analyst Jennifer Welch, and Democrat Senator from Illinois Tammy Duckworth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Modi Tried to Change India’s Parliament
title_cn: 莫迪为何试图改变印度议会
summary: Modi’s government tried to change the makeup of India ’s Parliament. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Andy Mukherjee explains what’s at stake. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Macron Offers a Glimpse of a Post-Presidency Outside Politics
title_cn: 马克龙让我们一睹卸任总统后政治之外的风采
summary: Emmanuel Macron has given few hints about his plan once he leaves the French presidency next year. But sitting among schoolchildren in Cyprus, he signaled it may not involve politics.
